research.problem_statement: Businesses in marketing spend significant manual effort on: AI SEO Content Pipeline. This automation eliminates repetitive tasks, reduces errors, and accelerates turnaround.
research.competitor_analysis: Scheduling tools exist but content generation + analytics + optimization in one pipeline is rare.
research.technical_feasibility: High — well-understood patterns, available APIs, proven agent architectures
research.roi_estimate: Saves 5+ hours/week on content ops. Pays for itself in 1-2 weeks.

roadmap.description: Businesses in marketing spend significant manual effort on: AI SEO Content Pipeline. This automation eliminates repetitive tasks, reduces errors, and accelerates turnaround.

agent_pipeline.name: content_generator
agent_pipeline.role: Generate platform-specific content from briefs and trends

agent_pipeline.name: scheduler
agent_pipeline.role: Optimize posting schedule by platform, audience, engagement data

agent_pipeline.name: analytics_agent
agent_pipeline.role: Track performance, generate insights, recommend optimizations
